title: チーム総合力アップ・嬉しい差し入れ

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Trainer. Your team has been working
so hard.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special, but this is a little token of my
support! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team is delighted by the thoughtful gift, and
our bonds grow deeper!
